sections.sectionTitle: Judah Mite' Lungtang Tungah Mawhna Kigelh

verses.text: Topa in a genna-ah, “Judah mite' mawhna sik laikung khat tawh kigelh hi. Suangmanpha mukzum tawh amaute' lungtang peek tung leh biakna tau kite tungah khuakin ki-at hi
A tate un singnim nuai khempeuh leh mualsangte' tunga a biakna taute uh leh a nusian uh Asherah milimte phawk veve uh a
zanglei-a om mualte tungah zong tua mawhna a kilang hi. Na gamsung khempeuh uhah na bawl uh mawhnate hangin na neih na lam uh leh na sum na paite uh, na galte uh ka tuahmangsak ding hi
Note kong piak na gam uh zong na taan ding uh a, na theih ngeiloh uh gam khatah na galte uh' na ka hong semsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna kitawhkuang a, a mit nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah: “Mi bek muangin mi' hatna bek suang a, Topa tawh a lungsim a kilehngat mi in hamsiatna a ngah ahi hi
Amah pen sehnel gamah a po sawlbawk bang hi a, khangin a bawk a phazo kei ding hi. Kuama ten'lohna ci gam, keugaw gamah amah a teng ding hi
“ Topa muangin amah a beel mi in thupha a ngah ahi hi
Amah, gun gei-a a kisuan singkung bang hi a, lui gei-ah a zung a kha hi. A tehte hing den ahih manin nisa kihtalo hi. Tatsat loin gah den ahih manin guah zukloh kum ciangin zong lungkham tuanlo hi
“Na khempeuh lakah lungsim a khem hatpen hi a, a kisia pha mahmah ahi hi. Kua in lungsim theizo ding ahi hiam
Keimah Topa in mi khempeuh' nuntakzia leh a gamtatna tawh kizui-in a piakhia dingin ngaihsutna ka entel a, lungsim ka sittel hi,” a ci hi
Thumanlopi tawh a hau mi pen ama tui lopi a keuhsak dingin a opsim vasa tawh kibang hi. A khan'lai-in a neihsa teng taan ding a, a tawpna-ah mihaipi a suak ding hi
I biakinnpi pen a kipat cilin mualtungah a om a minthang mahmah kumpi tokhom tawh kibang hi

Aw Topa, Israel mite' lametpa aw, nang a hong taisan mite a zahhuai ding uh hi. Nang a hong lehngatsan mite leivui laka min gelh bangin a mangthang uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna ciktui ahi Topa a hong taisanzo uh hi
Topa aw, hong damsak lecin ka natna teng bei ding a, hong honkhia lecin kei ka suakta ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen ka hong phatpa na hi hi
En in, amaute in, “ Topa' hong tawn'nate koi lai takah om ahi hiam? Tu-in hong tungta hen!” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute tungah gimna na tun'sak ding kong ngen kei a, siatna ni hong tun' ding ka deihsak lohlam zong na hong thei hi. Ka kam panin a gingkhia thu khempeuh na thei khin hi
Kei hong lausak kei in. Gimna hong tun' ciangin kong belhpa na hi hi

Kei hong bawlsiate na zahhuaisak in la, ahih hangin kei hong zahhuaisak kei in. Amaute lung-amsak in la, ahih hangin kei hong lung-amsak kei in. Amaute tungah siatna ni tungsak in la, a zah nihin susia in!
Topa in kei kiangah, “Va pai in la, Judah gam kumpite' lutna leh pusuahna Mite' Kongpi leh Jerusalem khua kongpite khempeuhah va ding in la, hih bangin va gen in
‘Hih kongpi sunga hong lut no Judah gam kumpite, Judah mi khempeuh, leh Jerusalem khuami khempeuhte aw, Topa' kammal ngai un
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Na nuntak nop lai uh leh kidawm un la, Sabbath ni-in van pua kei un. Jerusalem khua kongpite-ah bangmah hong lutpih kei un
Sabbath ni-in na inn uhah bangmah sem kei un. Na pu na pate uh ka thupiak mah bangin Sabbath ni siangthosak un
Ahih hangin na pu na pate un ka thu hong ngailo uh a, a bil uh hong ngatlo uh hi. Ka thu hong manglo uh a, ka hilhna a theihlohna dingun a lungsim uh a khauhsak uh hi
“‘Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in ka thu nong ngaih uh a, Sabbath ni-in hih khua kongpite-ah bangmah hong lutpih loin, Sabbath ni siangthosakin, na na sep kei uh leh

na kumpite uh leh na uliante un David' neih bang kumpi vangliatna a nei ding uh hi. Amaute in Judah mite leh Jerusalem khuamite tawh sakol leeng leh sakolte tungah tuangin hih khua kongpite-ah hong lut ding uh a, hih khuapi-ah zong mi teng tawntung ding hi

Mite in Judah gam khuapite leh Jerusalem khua kiim panin ahi zongin, Benjamin gam, Shefelah zanglei gam, mualtung gam, leh leitaw lam Negeb gamte panin ahi zongin meihal biakna leh biakpiaknate, an tawh biakna, paknamtui leh lungdam biakpiaknate, Topa' biakinn-ah hong pia ding uh hi

Ahih hangin ka thu nong ngaih kei uh a, Sabbath ni siangthosak loin, Jerusalem khua kongpite-ah van pua-in nong lutpih uh leh, tua kongpite ka hal ding hi. A mei in Jerusalem khua kumpi innte lawhin kangtum ding a, a mei a kiphelhzo kei ding hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi.
